item.title: Holy shit, someone write this script!
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Body painted myself as both Coraline x Other Mother - MCroft07
item.description: Trying out split paints, they're interesting and I think they look really cool. I couldn't make a decision for a while as to which version of Other Mother to paint, but I think it worked out pretty okay :) also this song is a bop Thanks to the people who are super kind and not inappropriate on my posts, it's appreciated. Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror It's from Coraline (a film) No, it is not AI. I painted my teeth with teeth paint. I use professional body paint covers I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-10 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes I did not go to art school, I am self taught If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them I can promise you there is not *someone else* painting them and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Cyberstuck in the snow in Montreal
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Backlogged memes: millennials
item.description:
Danger. But like the fun kind. Hello all, I have been way too morning sick and depressed to talk to anyone.
Not that anyone notices or cares when that happens. Gotta be entertaining or people forget about you right? I watched all of bojack horseman in like 3 days which is probably not good for your psyche but I figured hey I’m already sad. I think it actually helped but by god is it cynical.
I don’t know why more women don’t try this, it’s so freeing. My skin and hair did not suffer in the slightest when I switched to my boyfriend’s beauty regimen (such as it is) ages ago and I do not regret a thing.
I miss Taco Bell…
I’m the kind of bisexual that’s every other sexual, not twice a sexual.
Figured some of you would appreciate this
What else are you supposed to do honestly, it’s not like there’s a group to join that actually does things
Yeah pretty much. I hate people.
All true, why do we do this to ourselves
Pretty sure this is why 90% of the guys that liked me liked me and literally no other reason
I do love kids explaining things badly. It’s adorable.
Are millennials coming out of their cage and doing just fine? Because they’re Killers
I want this so bad.
Because “slavery” wasn’t catchy enough I guess
Why??? What is there to hate about science??? It just IS
Proud to be on the judgy side for once. Staying in the U.S. made me feel…complicit. There was awhile there when people were hating on anyone talking about moving to Canada if trump wins instead of staying to fight to make it better. No. Shut up. I’ll come back when you people actually start throwing Molotovs. Next argument.
There’s not any science to not support it!
To be fair only chase is a class traitor, being a cop. It’s my only issue with the show. That and having two recycling dogs when you don’t really even need one, but whatever. Kiddo got really into it so I tried to use it as bribery to potty train but he called my bluff so now he has no screen time at all. I am somehow both winning and losing.
It was.
The cleavage version, yw.
Everyone rn
Or by myself. This is not about you, stay focused
Why is this mannequin so attractive. Science needs to explain this.
The thought is very American. The execution is a horrifying nightmare that America would never touch. Kinda like German pizza.
I support her
Hope this helps someone because I have been too down
Finally, my deaf ass feels heard
Do not know if this is real or fake, dolphins suck that hard.
God is operating on levels the average novelist couldn’t comprehend. This is some bojack shit though seriously
We know, but hey!
The French are probably the most confused about why Americans are just not doing anything. They know what’s up you guys. You should see their lives they’re so happy.
I hate how this sounds in my head
Found this out when I lost a bunch of weight, it’s a trap
One of those memes that teach you something way faster and better than school
Crypto guys especially
Don’t look up vitamin d deficiencies whatever you do
Well let me try the shrooms first just to see for myself
Mine!
My cat has a Xanax scrip and he’s much happier when he’s on it but still he refuses. Fuzzy idiot.
Yeah no shut
I’m extremely blocked and my publisher is simultaneously breathing down my neck and refusing to help. And then to top it ALL off today the dentist DRILLED A FILLING WITHOUT WARNING OR ANESTHETIC IN FRONT OF MY CHILD after judging the state of my teeth. I don’t even know what to do with that???? That feels like something I should complain to someone about?? I came out of there sobbing and I basically haven’t stopped. But who caressssss, as long as I write my silly little books then a very small audience cares if I live or die and I’m lucky for even that much I am so sick of end stage capitalism and just how little energy we have to fucking care about anything
That’s my time, see you folks
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: A reaction dump
item.dc:creator: JowesCrow

item.title: Hobby - Cosplay
item.description: I did the meme... like a year too late - It's not my fault, the new studio space is begging for this kind of thing, okay?? Also, am I a day too late to hobby day? Dangit... I just finished up getting my new space in order! Plenty of new room to craft my cosplays, so I wanted to give a fist look at my new setup! Casue that's my hobby, and always will be! Also had to do the meme while recording my big new "Q&A" video for my fans this week - Really looking forward to next year as I put the new space to good use for you all!

item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: It took a while, but I got there
item.description:
I've been writing for decades, but only really tried to get into the industry around 2005-2015. I wrote 4 books, each for a different series, and all of them were rejected. I tried publishing to Amazon in 2012, but it was a pretty big flop. I gave up and thought that was the end of it.
The SFWA is kind of a like a union for Writers of SciFi, Fantasy, Horror, and related subgenres. You have to make a certain amount of money ($1000) and meet some other criteria to be a member. It's not a huge hurdle to clear, but it always seemed like it'd be out of reach for me. I started publishing in earnest back in late 2022 after spending the pandemic rewriting a story I'd had kicking around since 2018, at the encouragement of my wife. To my surprise, it was a modest success: enough to get me a six-book deal with a reputable audiobook company. This last week I finally reached out to the SFWA with my application and got approved. It's a modest milestone, sure, but it feels big for me. So I guess if you're like I was, and you've got some stories kicking around, please don't give up. I'm not raking in millions (not even close lmao) but I'm further along than I thought I'd be, and still enjoying the victories I get.
These are my books for the curious. I'm not going to link them here since that seems against imgur etiquette, but there's stuff in my profile if you want to dig around. I will absolutely link to another post I made about my cover artist, who is incredible: https://imgur.com/gallery/art-of-enzo-fernandez-jjQLCxn
Forest dog tax

item.title: Just in time for the holidays
item.description: Those of you who look back are able to see that I broke my leg in early April and lost my job as a result. By a stroke of good luck, I was able to save every penny I had almost all year to get a job in Washington. This job wasn't great, but it was a start, a new chapter where I could try to treat my depression and gain stability. There are both friends and family here. It should have been a good opportunity to start over. The cost of living has been stressful. I recently found a cheaper place to live but it didn't happen fast enough. I wore through my meager savings. Right when I began to stabilize, I was let go along with my entire team. I had a 300 dollar final paycheck from my employer. My car payment and insurance are both 30 days late. My rent is due in three weeks and my phone is about to lose service. The weeks of interviews just to receive rejection emails was what did me in, I think. I see no joy in my future. I don't want to live in a world where I'm just going to suffer and continue to be a parasite to those around me. But they keep telling me to fight. Maybe that's why I'm writing this. I don't know how I'm supposed to feel anymore. I don't know how to fight anymore. I don't have the energy either. I'm just screaming into the void here. Sorry, I'm so inconsistent. if you got this far, thanks for reading the ramblings of someone who certainly didn't deserve Your time. Edit: thank you all so much for your concern and kind words. Some of you have offered assistance as well. I don't deserve your kindness. Ive been gently pressured because im not used to receiving charity. I'm trying to be more accepting of help. So if you would like to assist, you can do so through my cashapp $andreeager And a gofundme https://gofund.me/6cd8f3c1 Edit 2: Most Viral! Not sure what to say here, but thanks for listening to a stranger cry out about his woes online.
item.dc:creator: EagerBarista

item.title: Thursday WHOLESOME Dump To Help You Get To The Weekend With A Smile
item.description:
1. A Real G
2. That's a nice massage
3. Cat be like: "WAIT, YOU CAN TALK!?! YOU SPEAK OUR ANCIENT LANGUAGE?"
4. I wish I could make this for everyone of you fine folk
5. Mmm fishy
6. Dog Teaches Kid How To Throw Ball
7. The Cutest Of Howls
8. WEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE
9. So Satisfying
10. German Firefighters help people cross a flooded area
11. Wholesome with a side of scary
12
13
14. Remember your worth : )
15. Man, this quote hits hard. For the past 19 months, I’ve been working on my own game, and while it’s starting to get a bit of attention, it just makes me doubt myself even more. A lot of people have played the demo, and I can feel the pressure because, come release day, it’s all or nothing. Some days it feels great, and other days, I’m completely burnt out. I just hope I can give people a similar experience to the ones I had growing up, playing games and having a blast. If you’d like to support my efforts, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have an awesome Thursday!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: A 30,000 year old baby mammoth preserved in ice
item.dc:creator: oopsAllHorcruxes

item.title: Armored Ciri Progress: Makeup and Wig
item.description:
Wig and makeup progress for my Armored Ciri cosplay, a redesign by Klaus Wittmann for the Witcher 3! I’m not gonna lie I wish this was my everyday look, I feel like such a badass. Contact lenses are from Pinky Paradise. I will say with this initial fit I’m already considering redoing the pauldrons and upper arm chainmail; the Pauldrons don’t fit quite right with my shoulders (the angle is off if that makes sense) and the chainmail bunches when it’s tucked into my bracers because it’s made of EVA foam. I will probably opt for a knitted material instead and make a full long sleeve shirt out of it that way I also don’t get those armpit gaps.
Makeup video
Wig video - I uploaded this to Instagram a while back and people voted for low pony so that’s what I went with!
item.dc:creator: LittleLuckyCosplay
